reasoning: Discord reportedly hired investment banks (Goldman Sachs and JP Morgan) in late March 2025 to prepare for an IPO later in the year. As of the knowledge cutoff date (May 23, 2025), there have been no SEC Form S-1 filings or official announcements on the company's blog. While a June filing remains possible, the timeline from hiring banks to a public filing (approximately 3 months) is aggressive. Recent reports from late April and May 23 indicate the company is still in the 'exploratory' or 'preparatory' stage, and IPO calendars show no imminent dates. With only five weeks remaining until the July 1 deadline and no signs of an impending announcement, the probability has decreased significantly.
